description: Full-screen hero countup with giant animated number, left-aligned with ghost number background

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Small label at top center, e.g. 'DAMAGE ASSESSMENT'
fields.COUNT_VALUE: Final number to land on, e.g. '247' or '4500'
fields.COUNT_LABEL: Label above the number, e.g. 'CONFIRMED VICTIMS'
fields.SUB_LABEL: Bold text below number, e.g. 'ORGANIZATIONS COMPROMISED'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Source or context line, e.g. 'Source: CISA Advisory 2024'
